name: fantastical-mcp
description: Read and create Fantastical calendar events. Queries events by date, calendar, or search. Creates events via natural language. No API keys or TCC permissions needed.

tools.name: get_today
tools.description: Get all calendar events for today

tools.name: get_upcoming
tools.description: Get events for the next N days

tools.name: get_calendars
tools.description: List all calendars with event counts

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get full details for a specific event

tools.name: get_events_by_calendar
tools.description: Get events from a specific calendar

tools.name: get_availability
tools.description: Show free/busy time slots for a date

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create an event using natural language

tools.name: show_date
tools.description: Open Fantastical to a specific date
